name: ubertooth
summary:
Project Ubertooth is an open source wireless development platform
suitable for Bluetooth experimentation. Ubertooth ships with a capable
BLE (Bluetooth Smart) sniffer and can sniff some data from Basic Rate
(BR) Bluetooth Classic connections.

documentation.readme: Project Ubertooth is an open source wireless development platform suitable for Bluetooth experimentation. Ubertooth ships with a capable BLE (Bluetooth Smart) sniffer and can sniff some data from Basic Rate (BR) Bluetooth Classic connections.
documentation.how_to_use: Clone or install `ubertooth` from its upstream repository, then run `ubertooth --help` (or the README entrypoint) to confirm flags.
